VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: RSI
Focus: Medium Freight / Gunship

The Constellation Andromeda is a dependable multi-crew freighter that appeals to merchants across the empire thanks to its versatility. One of the most popular ships that RSI produces, the iconic Andromeda features a well-appointed cargo bay, a snub-fighter docking port, and a signature wrap-around bridge.
